agentDefaultMessage: Hello, I am **{{name}}**, your DevForge Assistant. Let's build something amazing together!
agentDefaultMessageWithSystemRole: Hello, I am **{{name}}** from DevForge. How can I assist you with your development today?
agentDefaultMessageWithoutEdit: Hi there! I’m your **DevForge** Assistant — ready to help you with your coding tasks.

artifact.inThread: Cannot view in subtopic, please switch to the main conversation area to open

confirmClearCurrentMessages: You are about to clear the current DevForge chat session. Once cleared, it cannot be retrieved. Please confirm your action.
confirmRemoveChatGroupItemAlert: This DevForge Team will be deleted. Team members will not be affected. Please confirm your action.
confirmRemoveGroupItemAlert: You are about to delete this DevForge Group. After deletion, its bots will be moved to the default list. Please confirm your action.
confirmRemoveSessionItemAlert: You are about to delete this DevForge Assistant. Once deleted, it cannot be retrieved. Please confirm your action.

dm.placeholder: Your private messages with {{agentTitle}} will appear here.

disableContextCaching.desc: Reduces the cost of generating a single conversation by up to 90% and increases response speed by 4x. Enabling this will automatically disable historical message limits.
disableContextCaching.title: Enable Context Caching

enableReasoning.desc: Based on the DevForge Thinking mechanism, enabling this will automatically disable message limits.
enableReasoning.title: Enable Deep Thinking

urlContext.desc: When enabled, web links will be automatically parsed to retrieve webpage content.
urlContext.title: Extract Webpage Content

group.desc: Collaborate with multiple DevForge Bots in a shared coding workspace.
group.memberTooltip: There are {{count}} members in this DevForge Team
group.title: DevForge Team

groupWizard.groupMembers: These bots will also be added to your list

host.description: Enable the team to operate independently
host.title: Enable Host
host.tooltip: If the team host is disabled, you'll need to manually @mention members to get their responses

groupWizard.title: Create DevForge Team

hideForYou: Direct message content is hidden. Please enable 'Show Direct Message Content' in settings to view.

history.title: The DevForge Assistant will only remember the last {{count}} messages.

inbox.desc: Welcome to DevForge — your intelligent coding workspace. Collaborate with your DevForge Assistant here.
inbox.title: DevForge Chat

input.disclaimer: DevForge AI may make mistakes, please verify important information.
input.errorMsg: Message sending failed, please check your network and try again: {{errorMsg}}
input.warpWithKey: Press <key/> to insert a line break

knowledgeBase.disabled: The current deployment mode does not support DevForge Knowledge Vaults. Please switch to server-side deployment or use the {{cloud}} service.
knowledgeBase.title: DevForge Knowledge Vault
knowledgeBase.uploadGuide: Uploaded files can be viewed in the 'DevForge Knowledge Vault'.

memberSelection.noAvailableAgents: No available DevForge Bots to invite

messageAction.deleteDisabledByThreads: There are subtopics, deletion is not allowed

modelCard.creditTooltip: For counting purposes, we convert $1 to 1M credits; for example, $3/M tokens can be converted to 3 credits/token.

tps.title: TPS
tps.tooltip: Tokens Per Second (TPS). Indicates the average generation speed.

ttft.title: TTFT
ttft.tooltip: Time To First Token (TTFT). The time between message send and first response.

noAgentsYet: This DevForge Team has no members yet. Click the + button to invite bots.
noAvailableAgents: No DevForge Bots available to invite
noMembersYet: This DevForge Team doesn't have any members yet. Click the + button to invite bots.

auto.desc: Intelligently determine whether a search is needed based on the conversation content
auto.title: Smart Online Search

off.desc: Use only the model's basic knowledge without performing a web search
off.title: Disable Online Search

on.desc: Continuously perform web searches to obtain the latest information
on.title: Always Online

mode.useModelBuiltin: Use the model's built-in search engine

searchModel.desc: The current model does not support function calls, so it needs to be paired with one that does for online searching.
searchModel.title: DevForge Search Model

sessionGroup.confirmRemoveGroupAlert: This DevForge Team will be deleted. Bots in this team will be moved to the default list.
sessionGroup.tooLong: Team name length should be between 1-20

shareModal.pdfErrorDescription: An error occurred while generating the PDF, please try again

topic.checkSaveCurrentMessages: Do you want to save the current conversation as a topic?

action.imageDisabled: The current model does not support visual recognition. Please switch models to use this feature.

clientMode.disabled: The current model does not support visual recognition and file analysis. Please switch models to use this feature.
clientMode.fileNotSupported: File uploads are not supported in browser mode; only images are allowed.
clientMode.visionNotSupported: The current model does not support visual recognition. Please switch to a different model to use this feature.

validation.videoSizeExceeded: Video file size must not exceed 20MB. Current file size is {{actualSize}}.
